苹果停产 Mac Pro

Apple Discontinues Mac Pro

news.ycombinator.com 作者 alifeinbinary 分数 50 评论 5 2026/03/27 07:11
打开 HN 原帖

正文（中文）

...没有未来硬件的计划。安息吧。可维修、可维修、可升级的 Mac 正式成为过去。
...no plans for future hardware. RIP. Serviceable, repairable, upgradable Macs are officially a thing of the past.

DuckConference 2026/03/27 08:01
虽然这是一个谣言网站：

> Apple 还向 9to5Mac 确认，没有计划提供未来的 Mac Pro 硬件。

While it's a rumour site:

> Apple has also confirmed to 9to5Mac that it has no plans to offer future Mac Pro hardware.

在 HN 中查看
codazoda 2026/03/27 07:34
我不是 Op，但我只是在看这些。我打开 Apple.com，发现单击“Mac”时“Mac Pro”选项消失了。

我不知道它们的可配置性如何，因为我认为任何 M 系列处理器都在设计上集成了 RAM。

无论如何，看起来他们确实已经删除了它们。

I’m not Op but I was just looking at these. I jumped on Apple.com and notice the “Mac Pro” option is gone when clicking “Mac”.

I don’t know how configurable these were as I think any M-series processor had integrated RAM by design.

Anyway, it does look like they’ve removed them.
